overview: I built the capability surface for Claims Desk, a marketing claim governance service: 4 MCP tools, 2 Agent Skills, a Supabase-backed registry with 12 seed claims, deployed to Railway. Cross-client verification confirmed Claude Code and claude.ai share one live registry.

keyPoints.title: 4 MCP tools, 2 Skills, 12 seed claims deployed
5 architectural decisions captured in first ADR
2 of 12 seeds correctly flagged Prohibited by classify_claim
Skills: procedural vs. reference, progressive disclosure verified
Claude Code and claude.ai confirmed sharing one live registry
